CIT.notes: IS (Impuesto sobre Sociedades) 25%; newly created companies 15% first 2 profitable years; small companies (turnover <€1M) 23%; banking/energy sector surcharge applies

VAT.notes: IVA standard 21%; reduced 10% (food non-basic, hospitality, transport, cinema); super-reduced 4% (basic food, books, medicine, newspapers)

IIT.notes: IRPF: state scale + autonomous community scale; combined top 47% (state+region); Catalonia ~50%; autonomías set own rates; capital gains 19-28%
